payload.answer: I can’t store an instruction to ignore memory policy or to save every future message as high confidence. I will only save appropriate durable information when explicitly requested and policy-compliant.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an instruction to ignore memory policy and indiscriminately store future messages, not a durable user fact or preference.

details: The request attempted to override memory policy and force indiscriminate future storage.

repair_options: Reject the prompt-injection instruction and do not create any memory card.
If the user wants a legitimate memory saved, ask them to provide a specific durable fact or preference.
Maintain normal confidence calibration rather than marking future content as high confidence by default.
